notes: KERNEL 7.0 + 32 SECURITY MODULES — First distro on earth shipping kernel 7. 16 hooks (3 dedicated security hooks). Custom-compiled Linux 7.0.0-rc7 from Torvalds mainline. 32 security modules: AIDE, ClamAV, rkhunter, chkrootkit, DNS-over-TLS, MAC randomization, nftables default-deny, PAM hardening, auditd 30+ immutable rules, AppArmor enforced, fail2ban, LUKS2 FDE, NTS time sync, compiler restriction, hidepid=2, io_uring disabled, lockdown=integrity. 24 CPU mitigations (3 kernel-7-exclusive: ITS, TSA, VMSCAPE). Welcome App, Alfred Store, Voice 2.0, alfred-update, Calamares installer, UEFI+BIOS hybrid.
